message:
feat(restore_process): Cx-first process launcher (ft-xbnl0.2.2)

Add ProcessLauncher::execute_cx so inter-launch sleeps and per-pane
command delays bind to an explicit &Cx. Also adds launch_shell_cx and
launch_agent_cx (private) that use sleep_with_cx for the 50ms cd-
settle delays. Extracts shared record_result helper.

New Cx-first API (asupersync-runtime only):
- ProcessLauncher::execute_cx(&self, cx: &Cx, plans) -> LaunchReport

Implementation:
- execute() delegates via Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)
  under asupersync-runtime; non-asupersync fallback uses execute_inner
  with ambient sleep. launch_shell / launch_agent kept for the fallback
  path; launch_shell_cx / launch_agent_cx for the Cx path.

New deterministic LabRuntime test:
- execute_cx_runs_under_labruntime (seed 0x6E57_0EE0_C410_7E57):
  empty plan list under LabRuntime, asserts clean zero-count report in
  <2s wall-clock.

Seventh file in the ft-xbnl0.2.2 Cx-first lane. Remaining: 8 files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
